sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(QuyChuan) FROM giangday WHERE NamHoc = '2025 - 2026' AND id_User = 11) AS gd, (SELECT SUM(quy_chuan) FROM vg_lop_ngoai_quy_chuan WHERE nam_hoc = '2025 - 2026' AND id_User = 11 AND khoa_duyet = 1) AS lnqc, (SELECT SUM(quy_chuan) FROM vg_coi_cham_ra_de WHERE nam_hoc = '2025 - 2026' AND id_User = 11 AND khoa_duyet = 1) AS kthp, (SELECT SUM(SoTiet) FROM exportdoantotnghiep WHERE NamHoc = '2025 - 2026' AND id_User = 11 AND isMoiGiang = 0) AS da, (SELECT SUM(so_tiet_quy_doi) FROM vg_huong_dan_tham_quan_thuc_te WHERE nam_hoc = '2025 - 2026' AND id_User = 11) AS hdtq LIMIT 200
